current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker channels (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Jared Alderman) are heavily GTO-solver-focused, but Bart Hanson's Crush Live Poker content steelmans a live-game, exploitative-adjustment lens that solver-pure content often undersells — the argument being that population tendencies in live games create massive edges that pure GTO ignores. Bart runs solo hand-history breakdowns and call-in formats that force applied reasoning rather than solver outputs. The depth is practical and analytical without being recreational-player generic.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
